The '''Ringali Shell''' was an area along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] as it passed through the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea]] and [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sectors]], with the [[Ringali Nebula/Legends|Ringali Nebula]] wrapping around it. It consisted of six highly-populated systems that, in order, connected the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]], [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]], and [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="The Far Orbit Project" />
